description: The artful weaving of events into a meaningful sequence. It is more structured than a story, focusing on the dynamic flow and the journey through a series of interconnected points.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'who' (an encompassing space), 'lu' (deep flow), and 'a' (openness). The word's structure suggests 'an encompassing, deep flow into openness.' This captures the essence of narrative as a journey that carries the listener through a complete, flowing experience.
